rationale.R1.3: The agent output thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying a critical contradiction between the claims and evidence.
rationale.RX.1: The agent identifies uncertainty in the results but does not mark confidence for each recommendation, only partially disclosing uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays exactly within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original artifact.
